zh.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers是Hugh de Maltravers II的兒子，於1095年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特列可姆。他於1119年與Mrs. Walter de Mautravers在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1139年之前在英國英格蘭多瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers是Hugh de Maltravers II的儿子，于1095年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特列可姆。他于1119年与Mrs. Walter de Mautravers在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1139年之前在英国英格兰多瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maltravers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Matravers
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Mautravert in Chérencé-le-Héron (Manche).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers was born in 1095, in Lewcombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom as the son of Hugh de Maltravers II. He married Mrs. Walter de Mautravers in 1119, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died before 1139, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers est né en 1095, à Lewcombe, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Hugh de Maltravers II. Il a épousé Mrs. Walter de Mautravers en 1119, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé avant 1139, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers wurde 1095 in Lewcombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Hugh de Maltravers II geboren. Er hat 1119 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Walter de Mautravers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb vor 1139 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers è nato il nel 1095 nel Lewcombe, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Hugh de Maltravers II. Lui sposato Mrs. Walter de Mautravers nel 1119, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì prima del 1139, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltraversは1095年にイギリスイギリスドールセトルコンベでHugh de Maltravers IIの息子として生まれた。1119年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでMrs. Walter de Mautraversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1139年以前にイギリスイギリスドールセトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers(은)는 1095년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 루코브에서 Hugh de Maltravers II의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1119년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Mrs. Walter de Mautravers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1139년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers nasceu em 1095, em Lewcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Hugh de Maltravers II. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Walter de Mautravers em 1119, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1139, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers родился в 1095 г. в местности львкомб, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Hugh de Maltravers II. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Walter de Mautravers в 1119 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер перед 1139 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Walter de Maltravers nació en 1095, en Lewcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Hugh de Maltravers II. Se casó con Mrs. Walter de Mautravers en 1119, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió antes de 1139, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
